exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.instructions: Brace hard, sit between your hips, keep the bar over mid-foot, and drive up without letting your knees cave in.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Set your shoulder blades, keep your wrists stacked over your elbows, lower under control, and press without bouncing.

exercises.name: Conventional Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Brace before you pull, keep the bar close to your legs, push the floor away, and lock out without overextending.

exercises.name: Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.instructions: Squeeze your glutes, keep your ribs down, press in a straight path, and finish with the bar over your mid-foot.

exercises.name: Barbell Bent Over Row
exercises.instructions: Brace your torso, keep your back angle steady, pull your elbows behind you, and lower the bar without jerking.

exercises.name: Pull Up
exercises.instructions: Start from a dead hang, drive your elbows down, keep your chest tall, and avoid swinging to the bar.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.instructions: Set your shoulders first, pull your elbows toward your ribs, keep your torso steady, and control the return.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Walking Lunge
exercises.instructions: Take a long enough step to stay balanced, drop straight down, keep your front foot planted, and stand tall each rep.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.instructions: Set your feet evenly, lower until your hips stay tucked, drive through the full foot, and avoid locking your knees hard.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.instructions: Set the bench first, keep your shoulders packed, lower the bells evenly, and press up without clanging them together.

exercises.name: Parallel Bar Dips
exercises.instructions: Stay tall between the bars, bend the elbows under control, keep your shoulders down, and drive to a strong lockout.

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.instructions: Brace before you lift, curl your pelvis up as your legs rise, and lower slowly without swinging.

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Decline Barbell Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Close Grip Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Barbell Floor Press
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Flat Press
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Decline Dumbbell Press
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Neutral Grip Dumbbell Press
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Floor Press
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Squeeze Press
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Incline Machine Chest Press
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Plate Loaded Chest Press
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Push Up
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Feet Elevated Push Up
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Weighted Push Up
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Ring Push Up
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Cable Fly
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: High to Low Cable Fly
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Low to High Cable Fly
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Cable Crossover
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Standing Cable Fly
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Pec Deck Fly
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Fly
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Fly
exercises.instructions: Brace your upper back, keep your shoulders packed, move through a smooth range, and finish each rep under control.

exercises.name: Chin Up
exercises.instructions: Pull from a dead hang, keep your ribs down, drive the elbows toward your sides, and lower all the way under control.

exercises.name: Neutral Grip Pull Up
exercises.instructions: Stay long at the bottom, lead with your elbows, keep the grip neutral, and avoid kicking for extra height.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull Up
exercises.instructions: Set the belt or dumbbell securely, start from a dead hang, and move smoothly without swinging your legs.

exercises.name: Assisted Pull Up
exercises.instructions: Use only the assistance you need, keep your chest lifted, and finish each rep with your chin clearing the bar.

exercises.name: Wide Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.instructions: Set your shoulders before you pull, bring the bar to your upper chest, and let the lats stretch again on the way up.

exercises.name: Neutral Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.instructions: Keep your torso steady, pull the handles toward your collarbone, and control the eccentric instead of dropping the stack.

exercises.name: Reverse Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.instructions: Use a shoulder-width underhand grip, keep the chest tall, and drive the elbows to your hips.

exercises.name: Single Arm Lat Pulldown
exercises.instructions: Brace your torso, pull one elbow down and in, and do not rotate to cheat the bottom position.

exercises.name: Straight Arm Pulldown
exercises.instructions: Keep a soft elbow bend, move from your shoulders, and finish with your hands by your thighs.

exercises.name: Pendlay Row
exercises.instructions: Reset on the floor each rep, keep your torso parallel, and pull explosively without losing your brace.

exercises.name: Yates Row
exercises.instructions: Use a slightly more upright torso, keep the bar close, and pull toward the lower stomach with control.

exercises.name: T-Bar Row
exercises.instructions: Plant your feet, keep your chest supported if available, and pull through the elbows instead of shrugging.

exercises.name: Chest Supported T-Bar Row
exercises.instructions: Keep your sternum on the pad, pull evenly with both arms, and pause when your elbows pass your torso.

exercises.name: Seal Row
exercises.instructions: Let the bar hang fully under the bench, keep your chest glued down, and row without bouncing the bar into the pad.

exercises.name: Single Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.instructions: Brace with the free hand, pull the elbow toward your hip, and keep your torso from twisting open.

exercises.name: Chest Supported Dumbbell Row
exercises.instructions: Set your chest on the bench, row both bells evenly, and avoid shrugging at the top.

exercises.name: Meadow Row
exercises.instructions: Hinge hard, keep the free hand braced, and pull the sleeve of the bar toward your back pocket.

exercises.name: Renegade Row
exercises.instructions: Widen your stance, brace your abs, and row without letting the hips twist side to side.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.instructions: Stay tall through the chest, lead with the elbows, and let the shoulders protract naturally on the return.

exercises.name: Single Arm Cable Row
exercises.instructions: Brace your trunk, pull one elbow behind you, and keep your chest squared to the machine.

exercises.name: Machine Row
exercises.instructions: Set the seat so the handles line up with your lower chest, pull hard, and return without the stack crashing.

exercises.name: High Row Machine
exercises.instructions: Keep your chest against the pad, pull the elbows down and back, and pause when your upper back is fully engaged.

exercises.name: Low Row Machine
exercises.instructions: Start with a full stretch, keep the chest tall, and drive your elbows back without leaning away.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.instructions: Pull toward your face with elbows high, rotate the hands back, and keep your neck relaxed.

exercises.name: Rear Delt Row
exercises.instructions: Use a wide elbow path, stop when the rear delts are squeezed, and resist the urge to shrug.

exercises.name: Inverted Row
exercises.instructions: Keep your body rigid like a plank, pull your chest to the bar, and lower until the elbows fully open.

exercises.name: Rack Pull
exercises.instructions: Set the pins so your start is strong, brace hard, keep the bar against you, and finish with stacked ribs and hips.

exercises.name: Straight Arm Cable Pullover
exercises.instructions: Keep your arms long, move from the shoulders, and stop when your lats are fully shortened.

exercises.name: Seated Barbell Overhead Press
exercises.instructions: Stay anchored on the bench, keep your ribs down, and press the bar vertically over your shoulders.

exercises.name: Push Press
exercises.instructions: Dip straight down, drive hard through the legs, and finish the press with a locked torso and elbows.

exercises.name: Single Arm Landmine Press
exercises.instructions: Brace your trunk, press the bar up and slightly forward, and avoid leaning away from the working arm.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.instructions: Set the bells at shoulder height, keep your wrists stacked, and press without flaring your ribs.

exercises.name: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.instructions: Stay tall on the bench, press both bells evenly, and lower until your elbows stay just below shoulder level.

exercises.name: Arnold Press
exercises.instructions: Rotate smoothly as you press, keep tension through the full arc, and do not rush the change of direction.

exercises.name: Z Press
exercises.instructions: Sit tall with straight legs, brace hard, and press overhead without leaning back to find space.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.instructions: Lead with your elbows, raise only to shoulder height, and lower slowly so the traps do not take over.

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.instructions: Stand tall, keep a slight elbow bend, and sweep the handle out until your upper arm reaches shoulder height.

exercises.name: Leaning Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.instructions: Use the lean to keep tension at the bottom, lift through the elbow, and avoid twisting through the torso.

exercises.name: Machine Lateral Raise
exercises.instructions: Set the pads to the elbows, keep your shoulders down, and raise with the side delts instead of shrugging.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Front Raise
exercises.instructions: Keep the ribs down, raise the bells to shoulder level, and lower under control without swinging.

exercises.name: Cable Front Raise
exercises.instructions: Stay square to the cable, lift with a soft elbow bend, and resist the weight on the way down.

exercises.name: Plate Front Raise
exercises.instructions: Hold the plate firmly, keep the chest down, and raise only until the shoulders stay stacked.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Rear Delt Fly
exercises.instructions: Hinge to a stable torso, sweep the bells wide, and stop before the traps shrug the motion away.

exercises.name: Reverse Pec Deck
exercises.instructions: Set the seat so your shoulders match the handles, open the arms wide, and pause with the rear delts squeezed.

exercises.name: Bent Over Rear Delt Raise
exercises.instructions: Keep your torso fixed, use a soft elbow bend, and move only through the shoulder joint.

exercises.name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
exercises.instructions: Cross the cables, stay tall, and separate your hands wide without arching your lower back.

exercises.name: Barbell Upright Row
exercises.instructions: Keep the bar close, lead with your elbows, and stop before shoulder position starts to pinch.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Upright Row
exercises.instructions: Lift the bells close to your body, elbows higher than hands, and keep the motion smooth.

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.instructions: Lock your elbows near your sides, curl without swinging the torso, and fully lower before the next rep.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.instructions: Use the angled grip that feels best on your wrists, keep the elbows quiet, and squeeze hard at the top.

exercises.name: Alternating Dumbbell Curl
exercises.instructions: Keep one arm still while the other works, turn the palm up as you curl, and control the lowering.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.instructions: Keep the neutral grip throughout, avoid rocking the bells, and finish with your elbow fully flexed.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
exercises.instructions: Let the arms hang back on the bench, keep the elbows from drifting, and use the full stretched range.

exercises.name: Preacher Curl
exercises.instructions: Press your upper arm into the pad, curl smoothly, and avoid dropping into the bottom stretch.

exercises.name: Machine Biceps Curl
exercises.instructions: Set the pivot to your elbows, stay pressed into the pad, and squeeze at the top of each rep.

exercises.name: Cable Curl
exercises.instructions: Keep steady tension on the cable, pin your elbows, and resist the weight back to the start.

exercises.name: Rope Hammer Curl
exercises.instructions: Keep the rope neutral, pull your thumbs toward your shoulders, and keep your torso tall.

exercises.name: Concentration Curl
exercises.instructions: Plant your elbow on the inside of your leg, curl without moving the shoulder, and squeeze at the top.

exercises.name: Bayesian Cable Curl
exercises.instructions: Step forward to create stretch, keep the elbow slightly behind the torso, and curl through a full range.

exercises.name: Spider Curl
exercises.instructions: Let the arms hang over the bench, curl without letting the upper arms drift, and lower all the way down.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
exercises.instructions: Use an overhand grip, keep the wrists stacked, and curl smoothly without letting the elbows flare.

exercises.name: Rope Triceps Pressdown
exercises.instructions: Set your shoulders down, pin your elbows, spread the rope at the bottom, and control the return.

exercises.name: Straight Bar Triceps Pressdown
exercises.instructions: Keep your elbows locked to your sides, press straight down, and finish with a hard triceps squeeze.

exercises.name: Overhead Cable Triceps Extension
exercises.instructions: Brace your trunk, keep the elbows pointed forward, and extend without letting the ribs flare.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Skull Crusher
exercises.instructions: Lower the bar behind your forehead with fixed elbows, then extend without letting the shoulders roll forward.

exercises.name: Close Grip Push Up
exercises.instructions: Keep the hands under the shoulders, keep your body rigid, and lower until the chest nearly meets the floor.

exercises.name: Single Dumbbell Overhead Triceps Extension
exercises.instructions: Hold the bell securely, keep your elbows tucked, and lower only as far as you can keep the upper arms stable.

exercises.name: Tate Press
exercises.instructions: Start with elbows flared and bells over the chest, then extend by driving the bells away in a controlled arc.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Triceps Kickback
exercises.instructions: Hinge until your upper arm is parallel to the floor, then extend without moving the shoulder.

exercises.name: Bench Dip
exercises.instructions: Keep your hands close to the hips, lower only as far as your shoulders stay comfortable, and press back up hard.

exercises.name: Machine Dip
exercises.instructions: Keep your chest slightly forward, lower under control, and drive through the handles to full elbow extension.

exercises.name: Cable Triceps Kickback
exercises.instructions: Set the cable low, keep the upper arm fixed, and extend fully without shrugging the shoulder.

exercises.name: JM Press
exercises.instructions: Lower the bar toward your upper chest with elbows forward, then press up by extending through the triceps.

exercises.name: Cross Body Hammer Curl
exercises.instructions: Curl across your torso without turning the wrist, keep the shoulder quiet, and lower with control.

exercises.name: Cable Overhead Curl
exercises.instructions: Set both pulleys high, keep the elbows level with the shoulders, and curl toward your temples.

exercises.name: Barbell Front Squat
exercises.instructions: Keep the elbows high, stay tall through the chest, and drive up while the bar stays balanced over mid-foot.

exercises.name: Safety Bar Squat
exercises.instructions: Brace before you descend, keep pressure through the whole foot, and let the safety bar stay centered over you.

exercises.name: Zercher Squat
exercises.instructions: Keep your elbows tucked, stay tall through the upper back, and sit down between your hips with control.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.instructions: Hold the bell close, keep the ribs stacked over the hips, and let the knees travel naturally over the toes.

exercises.name: Hack Squat
exercises.instructions: Set your stance first, keep your hips and back pinned to the pad, and lower only as far as you can stay stacked.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Squat
exercises.instructions: Set your feet so the bar path matches your balance, brace hard, and do not relax into the bottom.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.instructions: Stay balanced over the front foot, lower straight down, and drive through the front leg without pushing off the back leg.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
exercises.instructions: Step back under control, keep the front foot flat, and stand up by pushing through the front leg.

exercises.name: Step Up
exercises.instructions: Use a box height you can control, plant the whole foot, and stand tall without bouncing off the rear leg.

exercises.name: Leg Extension
exercises.instructions: Line the machine up with your knee, extend smoothly, and pause without slamming into lockout.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Push your hips back, keep the bar on your legs, stop when your hamstrings are loaded, and stand up by squeezing the glutes.

exercises.name: Stiff Leg Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Keep only a slight knee bend, hinge from the hips, and stay braced so your back shape does not change.

exercises.name: Good Morning
exercises.instructions: Unlock the knees, hinge with a long spine, and stop once your hamstrings are loaded but your brace is still strong.

exercises.name: Glute Ham Raise
exercises.instructions: Keep the hips extended, lower only as far as you can control, and pull back up by driving your toes into the plate.

exercises.name: Lying Leg Curl
exercises.instructions: Keep your hips pressed down, curl through the hamstrings, and lower slowly instead of dropping the pad.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Curl
exercises.instructions: Set the back pad first, keep your torso still, and squeeze the hamstrings at the bottom of each rep.

exercises.name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
exercises.instructions: Brace your torso, lower as slowly as possible, and catch yourself with the hands only as needed.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.instructions: Tuck your ribs, drive through your heels, finish with the hips level, and do not hyperextend your lower back.

exercises.name: Barbell Glute Bridge
exercises.instructions: Set your feet under your knees, brace first, and drive the hips up until the glutes fully shorten.

exercises.name: Cable Glute Kickback
exercises.instructions: Stay braced, keep the leg slightly bent, and move from the hip instead of arching the lower back.

exercises.name: Cable Pull Through
exercises.instructions: Hinge back until you feel the stretch, keep the rope close, and finish by squeezing the glutes through.

exercises.name: Sumo Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Set your feet wide, push the knees out, keep the bar close, and stand up by driving the floor apart.

exercises.name: Trap Bar Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Brace with your chest up, push through the floor, keep the handles level, and finish tall without leaning back.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.instructions: Use the full stretch at the bottom, rise as high as you can through the big toe, and pause before lowering.

exercises.name: Seated Calf Raise
exercises.instructions: Keep the knees steady, drop into a full stretch, and drive the pad up by pressing through the forefoot.

exercises.name: Leg Press Calf Raise
exercises.instructions: Keep the knees soft, press through the balls of your feet, and use the full range without bouncing.

exercises.name: Tibialis Raise
exercises.instructions: Keep your heels planted, pull the toes toward your shins, and hold the top for a clean contraction.

exercises.name: Curtsy Lunge
exercises.instructions: Step behind and across only as far as your hips stay square, keep the front foot planted, and stand smoothly.

exercises.name: Single Leg Romanian Deadlift
exercises.instructions: Stay long through the spine, reach the free leg back, and keep the hips level while you hinge.

exercises.name: Split Squat
exercises.instructions: Stay balanced front to back, lower under control, and drive up through the front foot with your torso tall.

exercises.name: Pause Back Squat
exercises.instructions: Own the bottom position with a full pause, keep the brace, and drive out of the hole without shifting forward.

exercises.name: Tempo Goblet Squat
exercises.instructions: Lower slowly with tension, stay upright, and drive up only after the tempo is complete.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.instructions: Squeeze your glutes, keep your ribs tucked, and maintain a straight line from head to heels.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.instructions: Stack your ribs over your pelvis, press the floor away, and keep the top hip from drifting behind you.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
exercises.instructions: Brace before you roll, keep your hips from sagging, and pull back only as far as you can stay stacked.

exercises.name: Hanging Knee Raise
exercises.instructions: Start from a dead hang, tuck the knees by curling the pelvis up, and avoid swinging your torso.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.instructions: Lock your hips, curl your ribs toward your pelvis, and reset tall before each rep.

exercises.name: Weighted Crunch
exercises.instructions: Hold the weight securely, curl the upper spine segment by segment, and lower with control instead of flopping back.

exercises.name: Decline Sit Up
exercises.instructions: Brace before you move, roll up smoothly, and descend under control without yanking the neck.

exercises.name: Reverse Crunch
exercises.instructions: Press your lower back into the floor, lift by curling the pelvis, and lower without losing tension.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.instructions: Keep your lower back flat, move opposite arm and leg slowly, and exhale through the hardest part.

exercises.name: Hollow Body Hold
exercises.instructions: Flatten your lower back into the floor, reach long through the arms and legs, and only extend as far as you can keep tension.

exercises.name: Russian Twist
exercises.instructions: Stay tall through the spine, rotate through the ribs, and keep the movement controlled instead of rushed.

exercises.name: Pallof Press
exercises.instructions: Brace before you press the handle away, keep your shoulders level, and do not let the cable rotate you.

exercises.name: Mountain Climber
exercises.instructions: Keep your hands stacked under the shoulders, maintain a plank, and drive the knees without bouncing the hips.

exercises.name: Bird Dog
exercises.instructions: Reach long rather than high, keep the hips level, and pause before returning to the start.

exercises.name: V Up
exercises.instructions: Lift through the abs, meet the hands and feet in the middle, and lower with tension instead of collapsing.

exercises.name: Toe Touch Crunch
exercises.instructions: Keep the legs still, curl the upper back off the floor, and reach with the ribs rather than the neck.

exercises.name: Cable Wood Chop
exercises.instructions: Turn through the torso, keep your hips stable, and finish each rep with the abs braced.

exercises.name: Suitcase Carry
exercises.instructions: Stand tall, keep the bell from pulling you sideways, and take smooth controlled steps.

exercises.name: Burpee
exercises.instructions: Move with a consistent rhythm, stay braced through the plank, and land softly before the next rep.

exercises.name: Assault Bike Sprint
exercises.instructions: Brace your trunk, drive hard through the pedals and handles, and keep effort high for the full interval.

exercises.name: Rowing Sprint
exercises.instructions: Push with the legs first, swing only after the legs extend, and keep the handle path smooth back to the flywheel.

exercises.name: Jump Rope
exercises.instructions: Stay light on the forefoot, turn from the wrists, and keep the jumps low and relaxed.

exercises.name: Sled Push
exercises.instructions: Lean into the sled with a rigid torso, drive short powerful steps, and keep pressure through the whole foot.

exercises.name: Farmer Carry
exercises.instructions: Grip the implements hard, stay tall through the torso, and walk with short controlled steps.

exercises.name: Battle Rope Slam
exercises.instructions: Brace before each slam, lift with the shoulders and trunk together, and finish by driving the ropes straight down.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.instructions: Hinge back sharply, snap the hips through, and let the bell float rather than lifting it with your arms.

exercises.name: Clean Pull
exercises.instructions: Stay over the bar off the floor, keep it close to your body, and extend hard through the hips before you shrug.

exercises.name: Power Clean
exercises.instructions: Push the floor away, keep the bar close, and pull under quickly into a stable catch.

exercises.name: Thruster
exercises.instructions: Drive out of the squat first, then send the bar overhead in one smooth motion without pausing halfway.

exercises.name: Wall Ball
exercises.instructions: Sit into the squat under control, drive up hard, and throw to the same target every rep.

exercises.name: Box Jump
exercises.instructions: Load your hips, swing the arms, and land quietly in an athletic position before standing tall.

exercises.name: Broad Jump
exercises.instructions: Load through the hips, explode forward, and stick the landing without letting the knees collapse in.

exercises.name: Medicine Ball Slam
exercises.instructions: Reach long overhead, brace your trunk, and drive the ball to the floor with your whole body.

exercises.name: Turkish Get Up
exercises.instructions: Keep your eyes on the bell, move one step at a time, and make every position stable before the next transition.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Bench Press
exercises.instructions: Set the bench so the bar tracks over your mid-chest, keep your shoulders packed, and lower with full control.

exercises.name: Single Arm Cable Press
exercises.instructions: Stay square through the torso, press straight out, and resist the cable from rotating you.

exercises.name: Machine Pullover
exercises.instructions: Keep your ribs down, move through the shoulder joint, and finish with the lats fully shortened.

exercises.name: Reverse Grip Barbell Row
exercises.instructions: Use an underhand grip, keep the bar close, and pull toward the lower ribs without jerking.

exercises.name: Cable Y Raise
exercises.instructions: Lift in a Y path with soft elbows, keep the shoulders down, and stop before your ribs flare.

exercises.name: Machine Shoulder Press
exercises.instructions: Set the seat so the handles start at ear height, press evenly, and lower under control.

exercises.name: Single Arm Cable Pressdown
exercises.instructions: Keep the elbow pinned to your side, press to a full lockout, and let the handle rise slowly.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Reverse Curl
exercises.instructions: Use the overhand grip that feels best, keep the elbows quiet, and lower without the wrists folding.

exercises.name: Belt Squat
exercises.instructions: Brace before you descend, keep your torso tall, and drive evenly through both feet.

exercises.name: Single Leg Press
exercises.instructions: Keep your hips square in the seat, lower under control, and press through the whole foot.

exercises.name: Smith Machine Split Squat
exercises.instructions: Set your stance before unracking, drop straight down, and stay balanced over the front foot.

exercises.name: Cable Reverse Crunch
exercises.instructions: Curl the pelvis up first, keep the lower back rounded, and lower slowly without losing tension.

exercises.name: Weighted Plank
exercises.instructions: Brace as if preparing for a punch, keep the hips level, and do not let the plate change your posture.

exercises.name: Sled Drag
exercises.instructions: Stay tall, take quick balanced steps, and keep constant tension on the sled from start to finish.

exercises.name: Sandbag Carry
exercises.instructions: Own the bag position first, brace your trunk, and walk without letting the load pull you out of shape.
